title: Lead Router
description: Build a lead routing API. Prospects submit leads (name, email, company, size). The server applies routing rules: SMB → alice, Mid-market → bob, Enterprise → charlie — set assigned_to automatically before saving. Need: POST /api/leads (submit + auto-route), GET /api/leads (list), GET /api/leads/new (only status='new').
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a Leads table:
  name, required
  email, required
  size, default 'SMB'
  assigned_to
  status, default 'new'

# Your endpoints here
